name: buffer-overflow
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*cpy|.*cat|.*sprintf|gets").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tbuffer-overflow")
}

name: command-injection
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("system|popen|execl|execve|execvp|execlp|execvpe").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tcommand-injection")
}

name: tainted-buffer-access
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("gets|scanf|fscanf|vscanf|sscanf").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\ttainted-buffer-access")
}

name: format-string-risk
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("sprintf|vsprintf|snprintf|vsnprintf").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tformat-string-risk")

name: memory-leak
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("malloc|calloc|realloc|mmap|strdup").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tmemory-leak")
}

name: null-pointer-dereference
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*\..*").filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  code.contains("->") && (code.contains("null") || code.contains("0\)"))
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tnull-pointer-dereference")
}

name: integer-overflow
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*\+.*|.*-.*|.*\*.*|.*\/.*").filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  (code.contains("size") || code.contains("len") || code.contains("count") || code.contains("index")) &&
  (code.contains("+") || code.contains("-") || code.contains("*"))
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tinteger-overflow")
}

name: buffer-overread
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*memcpy.*|.*memmove.*|.*strncpy.*|.*strncat.*|.*memcmp.*").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tbuffer-overread")
}

name: use-after-free
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("free|delete").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tuse-after-free")
}

name: double-free
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.local.literal("0").definingCalls.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tdouble-free")
}

name: unchecked-return-value
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("read|recv|recvfrom|fread|getenv|strlen").filter { c =>
  c.inMethod.length > 0 && !c.method.name.headOption.getOrElse("").contains("if")
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tunchecked-return-value")
}

name: resource-exhaustion
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*alloc.*|.*malloc.*|.*calloc.*").foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tresource-exhaustion")
}

name: race-condition
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("open|write|read|access|fopen").filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  code.contains("thread") || code.contains("mutex") || code.contains("lock") || code.contains("atomic")
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\trace-condition")
}

name: integer-underflow
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  (code.contains("-") || code.contains("-")) &&
  (code.contains("size") || code.contains("len") || code.contains("offset") || code.contains("count"))
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tinteger-underflow")
}

name: out-of-bounds-read
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*read.*|.*recv.*|.*memcpy.*|.*strcpy.*").filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  code.contains("+") && (code.contains("len") || code.contains("size") || code.contains("index"))
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tout-of-bounds-read")
}

query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name("open|fopen|access|stat").filter { c =>

  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tpath-traversal")

name: stack-buffer-overflow
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.name(".*cpy|.*cat|sprintf").filter { c =>
  val code = c.code.toLowerCase
  code.contains("stack") || code.contains("local")
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)

name: pointer-arithmetic-error
query:
importCpg("%s")
cpg.method.call.filter { c =>
  val code = c.code
  (code.contains("+") || code.contains("-")) && code.contains("*") && (code.contains("ptr") || code.contains("pointer"))
}.foreach { c =>
  val code = c.code.replace("\t", " ").replace("\n", " ")
  val fileName = c.file.name.headOption.getOrElse("unknown")
  val lineNum = c.lineNumber.getOrElse(0)
  println(s"BNF\t${fileName}\t${lineNum}\t${code}\tpointer-arithmetic-error")
}
